quickPanel.guestHint: Sign in to read your live points and membership.
quickPanel.rechargeHint: Top up in common amounts or use a custom value.
quickPanel.upgradeHint: Unlock monthly bundled points and advanced workflows.
quickPanel.authRequired: Sign in to continue with points and membership actions.

page.title: Manage Points, Recharge, and Usage
page.description: Track your live point balance, recharge at the backend-configured rate, and purchase available VIP packs from the shared app SDK.
page.growthHint: Keep your workflows running with ready-to-use points.
page.empty: No point records found for this filter.
page.errorDescription: Please retry after the shared app SDK becomes available again.

rechargeDialog.title: Recharge Points
rechargeDialog.description: Choose a preset or custom amount, review the backend exchange rate, and submit the recharge through the real app SDK.
rechargeDialog.configureDescription: Preset values stay as quick actions, but the payable amount always comes from the backend-configured points-to-cash rate.
rechargeDialog.summaryDescription: The live rate, chosen payment method, and payable amount all come from the real points recharge contract.
rechargeDialog.rechargeDetailsDescription: Review the points quantity, original price, and actual payment here, then complete payment from the QR code on the right.
rechargeDialog.rateUnavailable: The backend has not returned a valid exchange rate yet.
rechargeDialog.paymentDescription: The QR code on the right updates with the selected payment method.
rechargeDialog.scanHint: Use {{method}} to scan the QR code above
rechargeDialog.paymentTip: Confirming sends a live recharge request for {{points}} points and refreshes the wallet after the payment result returns.
rechargeDialog.tip: Recharge uses the live account wallet service. Balance, history, and the quick panel refresh after the backend confirms the payment result.

upgradeDialog.title: Upgrade your subscription plan
upgradeDialog.description: Choose from the live VIP packs exposed by the app SDK and submit the purchase with the real membership contract.
upgradeDialog.summaryDescription: Review the current membership, selected package, duration, and bundled points before submitting the VIP purchase.
upgradeDialog.defaultPlanDescription: This VIP pack is available through the shared app SDK and can be activated immediately after purchase.
upgradeDialog.noPlans: No VIP packs are available right now.
upgradeDialog.summaryMeta: {{cycle}} cycle with an instant grant of {{points}} points
upgradeDialog.paymentLockedHint: The payment page is read-only. Use the back action in the top-left corner if you need to change the plan or monthly/yearly cycle.
upgradeDialog.paymentSummaryHint: Need a different package or cycle? Use the back action in the top-left corner first.
upgradeDialog.currentPlanHint: This selection matches your current active plan cycle, so there is nothing new to activate.
upgradeDialog.paymentDescription: The right side keeps the active QR code and payment summary in sync with your selected method.
upgradeDialog.scanHint: Use {{method}} to scan the QR code above
upgradeDialog.paymentTip: Confirming submits a live membership purchase for {{points}} points and refreshes the plan summary after the backend responds.
upgradeDialog.agreementPrefix: By paying, you acknowledge and agree to
upgradeDialog.packageDetailsDescription: Check the package, cycle, bundled points, and price before continuing to pay.

auth.signInRequired: Sign in to read, recharge, or upgrade your live points balance.

membership.freeMeta: You are currently using the free membership tier.

free.title: Free
free.tagline: A clean starting point for exploration and light daily use.
free.audience: Best for first-time users and product evaluation.
benefits: Core chat and workflow capabilities remain open
Upgrade to paid plans whenever capacity increases

plus.title: Plus
plus.tagline: A focused plan for creators and operators who need steady output.
plus.audience: Great for individual creators and compact execution teams.
benefits: Priority access to higher-intensity workflow runs

pro.title: Pro
pro.tagline: More monthly capacity for multi-task production and automation.
pro.audience: Built for teams handling deeper automation and heavier throughput.
benefits: Higher concurrency for complex task batches
Better fit for cross-team content and operations flows

ultra.title: Ultra
ultra.tagline: A team-scale plan for always-on automation and larger delivery loops.
ultra.audience: Designed for scaled teams with continuous workflow demand.
benefits: Best fit for team-wide automation coverage

dailyCheckIn.title: Daily check-in reward
dailyCheckIn.description: Your daily sign-in points have arrived.

aiImageGeneration.title: AI image generation spend
aiImageGeneration.description: Points used for a high-resolution image task.

referralReward.title: Referral reward
referralReward.description: Reward earned after a new user joined from your invite.

workflowRun.title: Workflow execution spend
workflowRun.description: Points used for an automation run.

welcomePack.title: Welcome bonus pack
welcomePack.description: Starter bonus points granted on first login.

planUpgrade.title: {{plan}} {{cycle}} plan activated
planUpgrade.description: {{points}} bundled points were granted instantly for {{amount}}.

toasts.invalidCustomPoints: Please enter a positive whole-number point amount.
